signal_evidence.capex_direction: Even while onboarding X1, we are keeping the midpoint of our full year outlook range unchanged... we are getting more efficient.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Gold cash sweep balances grew nearly 40% in Q2 and 130% year-to-date to reach $11 billion. Last week, we increased the interest rate to 4.9%.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: In Q2, we reached GAAP profitability for the first time as a public company... fifth consecutive quarter of revenue and adjusted EBITDA growth... adjusted EBITDA margin also reached a new high of 31%.
